description: Simple arithmetic — agent should use calculator tool
notes: Agent must prefer calculator over guessing

description: Multi-step math — may need multiple calculator calls
input: If a triangle has sides of 3, 4, and 5, what is its area and perimeter?

description: Temporal question — agent should call get_current_time
input: What year is it right now?
notes: Must not hallucinate the year; must use the time tool

description: Factual question that doesn't require any tool
input: What is the speed of light in a vacuum?
notes: Claude should answer from knowledge without calling tools

description: Calculator given invalid expression — agent should handle gracefully
input: Calculate the square root of negative one
notes: sqrt(-1) is imaginary; agent should explain this

description: Task requiring both time and calculator tools
input: How many seconds have elapsed since the Unix epoch started (Jan 1, 1970 UTC)?
